title: A Question Swirling Around Putin’s Big Conference: Could the War End?
summary_full: At the St. Petersburg economic forum, business and political elites said Russia faced a choice of halting the conflict or sacrificing more. Vladimir Putin seemed to signal more war.
summary_public: At the St. Petersburg economic forum, business and political elites said Russia faced a choice of halting the conflict or sacrificing more. Vladimir Putin seemed to signal more war.

RU.label: negative
RU.evidence: Vladimir Putin seemed to signal more war.
